Event

Joe Public 2030: 5 Potent Predictions Reshaping How Consumers Engage Healthcare

August 22, 2024
NRC Health's Hub24

NRC Health's Human Understanding Beyond 2024 (HUB24) is taking place August 21-23 at the Sheraton San Diego Hotel & Marina. BPD's Chris Bevolo and Stephanie Wierwille will be speaking on Joe Public 2030: 5 Potent Predictions Reshaping How Consumers Engage Healthcare, during their August 22nd panel.

What does the next decade of healthcare hold? This session will explore the next 10 years of patient and consumer activation strategies.

Join us for an insightful session based on Chris Bevolo's Joe Public 2030, where we explore five powerful predictions transforming consumer engagement in healthcare. Discover how new market entrants and increased competition, the evolving role of AI and personal monitoring, the politicization of healthcare, and growing health disparities will shape the industry.

Learn how to navigate these changes, leverage new technologies like AI and wearables, and understand the shifting dynamics between payers and providers.

This session will equip you with the knowledge to anticipate and influence the future of healthcare, ensuring you're prepared for the seismic shifts ahead. Don’t miss this opportunity to engage in a critical discussion and gain practical strategies for thriving in the next decade.

NRC Health's HUB24

Sheraton San Diego Hotel & Marina | Room Coral 1-2
